Setlist
Venues With the Most Shows Before a Full Live Release
This list ranks venues according to how many concerts the band had played there by the time the first full show played at that venue got an official release, including venues that have yet to receive official releases for any shows played there.

Note that venue names change over time. The name listed for each venue is either the name the venue had as of the first released performance, or the name it had at the time of the most recent DMB show.

The number given is the number of shows the band had played at that venue as of the day it got a release (*not* as of the performance being released). In the case of some early venues, the number of shows is not necessarily correct. Every venue with at least 10 known performances before the first release is listed. Venues still awaiting a release are highlighted.
Venue Name Location First Release # of Shows Before First Release Notes 
TraxCharlottesville, VADMBlive Vol. 23 142show count may be inaccurate
Flood ZoneRichmond, VADMBlive Vol. 10 85show count may be inaccurate
